title: Sales Manager Vacancy at HUDCO - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at HUDCO - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
HUDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HUDCO:
HUDCO is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HUDCO!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
